narrative:
North Royalton-06-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
